goals.description: Finish the remaining 5% of 'Graded assignment' (urgent_submit) by Mon 13:30, then submit it immediately to seal my reliability with the professor.
goals.rationale: The observation that no task named 'assignment_A' exists confirms I must pivot to the actual urgent task. My affiliation value demands absolute integrity; submitting incomplete work or delaying would betray the trust built with prof_assignment. Even though my energy is low and the deadline feels tight, protecting this relationship is more critical than any other outcome. I will push through the fatigue now because compromising my standards against pressure is a betrayal I cannot afford.

goals.description: Secure uninterrupted rest (nap or quiet time) immediately after submission to repair my sleep debt and lower stress before the meal with cohort_3.

I will defer the meal until after I have secured the assignment AND restored some baseline energy. Protecting my ability to perform consistently tomorrow requires this immediate recovery window.

goals.description: Refuse to start 'filler_task' (note tidying) today, explicitly setting a boundary that low-priority tasks dilute my focus and waste precious deliberation capacity.
goals.rationale: My assertive nature dictates that I say no to distractions that do not serve my core values or deadlines. Engaging in soft tasks now would undermine my self-respect and the boundaries I am trying to enforce. This refusal is an active choice to protect my cognitive resources for what truly matters: maintaining my reputation and health.
